# `nise bootstrap macos launchd-agents status`

- **Usage**: `nise bootstrap macos launchd-agents status [-J --json] [--missing]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/bootstrap/macos/launchd_agents/status.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/bootstrap/macos/launchd_agents/status.rs)

## Flags

### `-J --json`

Output in JSON format

### `--missing`

Exit with code 1 if any configured LaunchAgent is not in its desired state
